_comment: Meme manifest — registry of all available memes.
_how_to_use: Paste `!meme[name]` into any post .md file. E.g. `哈哈 !meme[大哭]`
_adding_a_new_meme: Simply drop your image file (e.g. 大笑.gif) into public/meme/. It auto-registers as !meme[大笑]. Optionally add metadata here (key = desired name). Example: add  "大笑": { "src": "/meme/大笑.gif", "type": "image/gif", "tags": ["reaction"] }  to this file to give it custom caption/tags. Manifest values override auto-detected filenames.
